name: New Potatoes in Sour Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub new potatoes and cut large ones in half so they are all about the same size.
2. Simmer until tender for about 20 minutes, then drain.
3. In a small saucepan, melt butter; stir in flour. Cook over medium heat for 2 minutes, remove from heat, and stir in milk. Return to heat and stir occasionally until thick.
4. Stir in chicken broth granules, sour cream, and parsley; heat only long enough to warm the sour cream.
5. Do not let it boil. Place potatoes in a serving bowl and pour the sauce over them.
6. Serves 4.
